Description.enUS:
Warps in Hybrid units.

Enables:
- Warriors
- Flayers

Tooltip.enUS: Drops the current order without performing it, and allows you to select a different order.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить текущий приказ и отдать следующий.

Tooltip.enUS: Cancels construction of this structure, destroying the structure and giving a partial refund.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить сооружение этого строения, уничтожив его и получив частичную компенсацию.

Tooltip.enUS:
General-purpose early-game infantry.

Can attack ground and air units.

Ferocious mid-game annihilator of light-units.

Can attack ground units.

Potent mid-game destroyer of armored units. Can use «Mace Strike» to provide long-range support.

Can attack ground units.

Mid-game fast unit. Can use Jump ability.

Can attack ground units.
Allows warp in air units.

Late-game monstrous creature. Has a devastating melee attack.

Can attack ground units.

Late-game psionic monstrous creature. Has a devastating ranged attack.

Can attack air and ground units.

Strong support unit that can disable casters.

Can attack ground and air units.

Ranged mid-game support strider.

Can attack ground and air units.
Sends constructed units to the designated point. Workers rallied to resources will begin gathering automatically.
Tooltip.ruRU: Sends constructed units to the designated point. Workers rallied to resources will begin gathering automatically.

Tooltip.enUS: Allows Void Rifts to transfer ground units between each other while they are connected to Network.
Loads units into the Void Rift.
Unloads all units.

Support mid-game air unit. Can restore Network to friendly units. Can use «Desolation» to cloak allies.

Network Power Source.

Detector

Can attack ground and air units.

Air unit. Posions its target from the void.

Can attack ground units.
Mid-game flying transport. Can use «Navigation» to teleport to any Player Unit.

Late-game assault-tanky air unit. Deals splash damage to enemy air units and slows down ground units.

Can attack ground and air units.
Drops the current order without performing it, and allows you to select a different order.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить текущий приказ и отдать следующий.

Tooltip.enUS: Allows warp in ground units.

Flagship air unit. Can use two attack modes.

Can attack ground and air units.
Sends constructed units to the designated point. Workers rallied to resources will begin gathering automatically.
Tooltip.ruRU: Sends constructed units to the designated point. Workers rallied to resources will begin gathering automatically.

Tooltip.enUS: Allows Void Rifts to transfer ground units between each other while they are connected to Network.
Loads units into the Void Rift.
Unloads all units.
Drops the current order without performing it, and allows you to select a different order.
Tooltip.ruRU: Отменить текущий приказ и отдать следующий.
